title: taraxacum oblongatum
intro: Taraxacum oblongatum, commonly known as the autumn dandelion or creeping dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum oblongatum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to reduce oxidative stress and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
